Package net.sourceforge.plantuml.core

Class AbstractDiagram

java.lang.Object
net.sourceforge.plantuml.core.AbstractDiagram
All Implemented Interfaces:
Diagram, WarningHandler
Direct Known Subclasses:
DirectOsDiagram, UgDiagram
public abstract class AbstractDiagram extends Object implements Diagram

    • exportXmi

      protected ImageData exportXmi(OutputStream os, FileFormat fileFormat) throws IOException
      Exports this diagram in XMI format. Returns null if this diagram type does not support XMI, allowing the caller to fall back to the standard TextBlock export path.
      Throws:
      IOException
